root.app_description: Configure multiple AI providers and chat with any model or model alias from one workspace.
root.not_found.description: The requested page could not be found.
root.footer.tagline: One workspace for every AI provider you configure.
index.meta_description: Connect OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more. Register models and aliases, then chat with any of them from a single app.
index.hero.title: Chat with any model you configure
index.hero.subtitle: Add AI providers, register models or aliases, and start conversations—switch providers without switching apps.
index.hero.authenticated.title: Welcome back, {name}
index.hero.authenticated.subtitle: Configure your AI providers and chat with any model or alias you've set up. You're signed in as {email}.
index.features.heading: Built for multi-provider workflows
index.features.providers.title: Multiple providers
index.features.providers.description: Connect OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and other providers with encrypted API keys stored per account.
index.features.models.title: Models & aliases
index.features.models.description: Register provider models or friendly aliases, then pick either one when you start a chat session.
index.features.chat.title: Unified chat
index.features.chat.description: Hold conversations in one interface—each session is bound to the model or alias you choose.
login.meta_description: Sign in to Kineti to manage AI providers and chat with your configured models and aliases.
login.description: Sign in with your email and password to manage providers and chat.
signup.meta_description: Create a Kineti account to configure AI providers and chat with models and aliases across providers.
signup.description: Sign up to configure providers and chat with any model or alias you register.
